name: terminal----finder
title: Terminal <--> Finder
description: 从PathFinder 打开到 Iterm2之类的终端，或者反过来打开
author: make3782

commands.name: pathfinder---iterm2
commands.title: PathFinder -> Iterm2
commands.subtitle: PathFinder 到 iterm2
commands.description: 将当前PathFinder 路劲打开到 iterm2

commands.name: iterm2---pathfinder
commands.title: Iterm2 -> PathFinder
commands.description: 将当前PathFinder 路劲打开到 iterm2

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
